mapper.sql: ranking_id, user_id, subject_id, scope_type, scope_key, period_type, period_key, score, rank_no, calculated_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ranking_scores ORDER BY rank_no ASC, score DESC, ranking_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ranking_scores ( user_id, subject_id, scope_type, scope_key, period_type, period_key, score, rank_no, calculated_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{subjectId}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeKey}, #{periodType}, #{periodKey}, #{score}, #{rankNo}, #{calculatedAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ranking_scores SET user_id = #{userId}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, scope_type = #{scopeType}, scope_key = #{scopeKey}, period_type = #{periodType}, period_key = #{periodKey}, score = #{score}, rank_no = #{rankNo}, calculated_at = #{calculatedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE ranking_id = #{rankingId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ranking_scores WHERE scope_type = 'SUBJECT' AND period_type = 'WEEKLY' AND period_key = #{periodKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ranking_scores ( user_id, subject_id, scope_type, scope_key, period_type, period_key, score, rank_no, calculated_at, created_at, updated_at ) SELECT ranked.user_id, ranked.subject_id, 'SUBJECT', ranked.subject_code, 'WEEKLY', #{periodKey}, ranked.score, ranked.rank_no, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() FROM ( SELECT agg.user_id, agg.subject_id, s.subject_code, agg.score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY agg.subject_id ORDER BY agg.score DESC, agg.user_id ASC ) AS rank_no FROM ( SELECT base.user_id, base.subject_id, COALESCE(base.practice_score, 0) + COALESCE(exam.exam_score, 0) AS score FROM ( SELECT se.user_id, se.subject_id, SUM(se.score_delta) AS practice_score FROM score_events se WHERE se.subject_id IS NOT NULL AND se.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) AND se.reason_code NOT LIKE 'ATTENDANCE%' GROUP BY se.user_id, se.subject_id ) base LEFT JOIN ( SELECT es.user_id, es.subject_id, COUNT(*) * 200 AS exam_score FROM exam_sessions es WHERE es.result_status = 'PASSED' AND es.submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND es.submitted_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) GROUP BY es.user_id, es.subject_id ) exam ON exam.user_id = base.user_id AND exam.subject_id = base.subject_id ) agg INNER JOIN subjects s ON s.subject_id = agg.subject_id ) ranked
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ranking_scores WHERE scope_type = 'SUBJECT' AND period_type = 'MONTHLY' AND period_key = #{periodKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ranking_scores ( user_id, subject_id, scope_type, scope_key, period_type, period_key, score, rank_no, calculated_at, created_at, updated_at ) SELECT ranked.user_id, ranked.subject_id, 'SUBJECT', ranked.subject_code, 'MONTHLY', #{periodKey}, ranked.score, ranked.rank_no, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() FROM ( SELECT agg.user_id, agg.subject_id, s.subject_code, agg.score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY agg.subject_id ORDER BY agg.score DESC, agg.user_id ASC ) AS rank_no FROM ( SELECT base.user_id, base.subject_id, COALESCE(base.practice_score, 0) + COALESCE(exam.exam_score, 0) AS score FROM ( SELECT se.user_id, se.subject_id, SUM(se.score_delta) AS practice_score FROM score_events se WHERE se.subject_id IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(se.created_at, '%Y-%m') = #{periodKey} AND se.reason_code NOT LIKE 'ATTENDANCE%' GROUP BY se.user_id, se.subject_id ) base LEFT JOIN ( SELECT es.user_id, es.subject_id, COUNT(*) * 200 AS exam_score FROM exam_sessions es WHERE es.result_status = 'PASSED' AND es.submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(es.submitted_at, '%Y-%m') = #{periodKey} GROUP BY es.user_id, es.subject_id ) exam ON exam.user_id = base.user_id AND exam.subject_id = base.subject_id ) agg INNER JOIN subjects s ON s.subject_id = agg.subject_id ) ranked
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ranking_scores WHERE scope_type = 'GLOBAL' AND period_type = 'MONTHLY' AND period_key = #{periodKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ranking_scores ( user_id, subject_id, scope_type, scope_key, period_type, period_key, score, rank_no, calculated_at, created_at, updated_at ) SELECT ranked.user_id, NULL, 'GLOBAL', 'ALL', 'MONTHLY', #{periodKey}, ranked.score, ranked.rank_no, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() FROM ( SELECT avg_scores.user_id, avg_scores.score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY avg_scores.score DESC, avg_scores.user_id ASC ) AS rank_no FROM ( SELECT subject_scores.user_id, ROUND(AVG(subject_scores.subject_score)) AS score FROM ( SELECT base.user_id, base.subject_id, COALESCE(base.practice_score, 0) + COALESCE(exam.exam_score, 0) AS subject_score FROM ( SELECT se.user_id, se.subject_id, SUM(se.score_delta) AS practice_score FROM score_events se WHERE se.subject_id IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(se.created_at, '%Y-%m') = #{periodKey} AND se.reason_code NOT LIKE 'ATTENDANCE%' GROUP BY se.user_id, se.subject_id ) base LEFT JOIN ( SELECT es.user_id, es.subject_id, COUNT(*) * 200 AS exam_score FROM exam_sessions es WHERE es.result_status = 'PASSED' AND es.submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(es.submitted_at, '%Y-%m') = #{periodKey} GROUP BY es.user_id, es.subject_id ) exam ON exam.user_id = base.user_id AND exam.subject_id = base.subject_id ) subject_scores GROUP BY subject_scores.user_id ) avg_scores ) ranked
mapper.select: SELECT ranked.userId AS userId, ranked.nickname AS nickname, ranked.score AS score, ranked.rankNo AS rankNo FROM ( SELECT rs.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, rs.score AS score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY rs.score DESC, rs.user_id ASC ) AS rankNo FROM ranking_scores rs INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rs.user_id INNER JOIN user_learning_profiles ulp ON ulp.user_id = rs.user_id WHERE rs.scope_type = 'SUBJECT' AND rs.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND rs.period_type = 'WEEKLY' AND rs.period_key = #{periodKey} AND ulp.current_level_code = #{leagueCode} ) ranked ORDER BY ranked.rankNo ASC

SELECT ranked.userId AS userId, ranked.nickname AS nickname, ranked.score AS score, ranked.rankNo AS rankNo FROM ( SELECT rs.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, rs.score AS score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY rs.score DESC, rs.user_id ASC ) AS rankNo FROM ranking_scores rs INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rs.user_id INNER JOIN user_learning_profiles ulp ON ulp.user_id = rs.user_id WHERE rs.scope_type = 'SUBJECT' AND rs.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND rs.period_type = 'WEEKLY' AND rs.period_key = #{periodKey} AND ulp.current_level_code = #{leagueCode} ) ranked WHERE ranked.userId = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT ranked.userId AS userId, ranked.nickname AS nickname, ranked.score AS score, ranked.rankNo AS rankNo FROM ( SELECT avg_scores.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, avg_scores.score AS score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY avg_scores.score DESC, avg_scores.user_id ASC ) AS rankNo FROM ( SELECT rs.user_id, ROUND(AVG(rs.score)) AS score FROM ranking_scores rs INNER JOIN user_learning_profiles ulp ON ulp.user_id = rs.user_id WHERE rs.scope_type = 'SUBJECT' AND rs.period_type = 'MONTHLY' AND rs.period_key = #{periodKey} AND ulp.current_level_code = #{leagueCode} GROUP BY rs.user_id ) avg_scores INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = avg_scores.user_id ) ranked ORDER BY ranked.rankNo ASC

SELECT ranked.userId AS userId, ranked.nickname AS nickname, ranked.score AS score, ranked.rankNo AS rankNo FROM ( SELECT avg_scores.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, avg_scores.score AS score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY avg_scores.score DESC, avg_scores.user_id ASC ) AS rankNo FROM ( SELECT rs.user_id, ROUND(AVG(rs.score)) AS score FROM ranking_scores rs INNER JOIN user_learning_profiles ulp ON ulp.user_id = rs.user_id WHERE rs.scope_type = 'SUBJECT' AND rs.period_type = 'MONTHLY' AND rs.period_key = #{periodKey} AND ulp.current_level_code = #{leagueCode} GROUP BY rs.user_id ) avg_scores INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = avg_scores.user_id ) ranked WHERE ranked.userId = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(se.score_delta), 0) FROM score_events se WHERE se.user_id = #{userId} AND (#{subjectId} IS NULL OR se.subject_id = #{subjectId}) AND se.reason_code IN ('PRACTICE_CORRECT', 'PRACTICE_SET_PASS', 'WRONG_ANSWER_RETRY_CORRECT') AND se.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY)

SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*) * 200, 0) FROM exam_sessions es WHERE es.user_id = #{userId} AND es.result_status = 'PASSED' AND es.submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND es.submitted_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) AND (#{subjectId} IS NULL OR es.subject_id = #{subjectId})

SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*) * 5, 0) FROM user_lesson_progress ulp INNER JOIN lessons l ON l.lesson_id = ulp.lesson_id INNER JOIN curriculum_nodes n ON n.node_id = l.node_id WHERE ulp.user_id = #{userId} AND ulp.theory_completed = 1 AND ulp.completed_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) AND (#{subjectId} IS NULL OR n.subject_id = #{subjectId})

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(se.score_delta), 0) FROM score_events se WHERE se.user_id = #{userId} AND (#{subjectId} IS NULL OR se.subject_id = #{subjectId}) AND se.reason_code IN ('PRACTICE_CORRECT', 'PRACTICE_SET_PASS', 'WRONG_ANSWER_RETRY_CORRECT') AND DATE_FORMAT(se.created_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')

SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*) * 200, 0) FROM exam_sessions es WHERE es.user_id = #{userId} AND es.result_status = 'PASSED' AND es.submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(es.submitted_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') AND (#{subjectId} IS NULL OR es.subject_id = #{subjectId})

SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*) * 5, 0) FROM user_lesson_progress ulp INNER JOIN lessons l ON l.lesson_id = ulp.lesson_id INNER JOIN curriculum_nodes n ON n.node_id = l.node_id WHERE ulp.user_id = #{userId} AND ulp.theory_completed = 1 AND DATE_FORMAT(ulp.completed_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') AND (#{subjectId} IS NULL OR n.subject_id = #{subjectId})
